title: rubus sorsogonensis
intro: Rubus sorsogonensis, also known as the Sorsogon raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubaceae. It is a perennial shrub that is native to the Philippines and is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Rubus sorsogonensis include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and wounds.
